decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly getting powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also includes disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo. The key strategy is to discard big creatures like Griselbrand, reanimate them for a low cost, and then use them to quickly close out the game. The deck aims to win through powerful combos and quick reanimation of key creatures to overwhelm the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cards like Devourer of Destiny, Spoils of the Vault, and Plunge into Darkness to quickly assemble a combo win condition. By effectively controlling the board with cards like Chancellor of the Tangle and Pact of Negation, while ramping up with Gemstone Caverns and Gemstone Mine, the deck aims to execute a powerful game-winning sequence using cards like Thud and Callous Sell-Sword. The inclusion of cards like Serum Powder and Cosmogoyf help provide consistency and resilience to the deck's strategy.

This deck focuses on generating mana quickly to cast powerful spells and combo off without relying on lands. By utilizing cards like Desperate Ritual and Manamorphose, the deck aims to ramp up to play big threats like Goblin Charbelcher and Sundering Eruption. The high number of rituals and mana-generating cards allows for explosive turns that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Legion Leadership and Pinnacle Monk to support the combo strategy and finish off the opponent in a swift manner.

The deck focuses on generating a large amount of mana quickly through cards like Ruby Medallion, Manamorphose, and rituals in order to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Past in Flames. By chaining together spells with flashback and generating extra effects through Artist's Talent, the deck aims to create a storm of spells that culminates in a lethal Grapeshot. The deck also utilizes Wish to search for specific cards to further its combo potential. The key strategy is to efficiently cast spells and generate enough mana to overwhelm the opponent in a single explosive turn.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly put pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, while also utilizing cards that provide additional value for the player, such as sacrificing creatures for added damage or card advantage. The deck also aims to control the board with removal spells and disruption, as well as using cards like Blood Moon to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast creatures, burn spells, and disruptive elements for a quick victory.

This Broodscale Bloodchief combo deck focuses on generating massive amounts of mana with cards like Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to quickly ramp into powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck also utilizes enchantments like Blade of the Bloodchief and Basking Broodscale to buff up creatures and create a formidable board presence. With the addition of control cards like Vexing Bauble and Malevolent Rumble, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its efficient and explosive combo potential.

This deck focuses on aggressively attacking your opponent while utilizing blink effects to take advantage of enter the battlefield abilities and protect your creatures. By quickly deploying threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, and using cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to blink creatures in and out of play, you can disrupt your opponent's game plan and maintain pressure on the board. With a mix of efficient removal spells like Solitude and disruptive cards like Thoughtseize, you can control the tempo of the game and overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures.

This deck aims to flood the board with artifact creatures and artifacts, using cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga to generate mana and tokens. It combines aggro tactics with the affinity mechanic, allowing for explosive fast-paced gameplay. The deck also includes disruption elements like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt to control the opponent's game plan. By utilizing artifact synergies and a low curve, the deck looks to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful artifacts.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Scion of Draco while using cards like Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding to control the board. It also includes aggressive cards like Lightning Bolt and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to pressure the opponent. Additionally, the deck utilizes a variety of lands to ensure consistent mana production. With a mix of creatures, removal spells, and disruption, this aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent early in the game.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive, fast-paced gameplay using powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, and Voice of Victory to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board. Additionally, the inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provides additional support and buffs for the creatures. The deck utilizes a mix of land cards to ensure consistent mana production and includes some versatile spells like Thraben Charm and Elegant Parlor for added versatility.

This deck aims to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures, such as Griselbrand and Atraxa, using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. The deck also utilizes instant-speed removal spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Faithful Mending and Thoughtseize provide card advantage and disruption, allowing the deck to survive and thrive in a fast-paced Modern environment. The deck's strategy revolves around setting up the combo pieces and quickly closing out the game with powerful creatures and spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant to quickly assemble a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It uses cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform to tutor for key creatures, while also utilizing cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect its combo pieces. The deck also includes cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Xenagos, God of Revels to provide additional support and pressure. Overall, the deck aims to quickly combo off and win the game before the opponent can effectively respond.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to consistently play powerful combo cards like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift. Utilizing Amulet of Vigor to untap lands and generate extra mana, the goal is to assemble the pieces needed to quickly put a large number of powerful lands into play and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards like Tolaria West and Green Sun's Zenith to help find key pieces of the combo, while also including utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Lotus Field for added versatility in different matchups.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful burn spells. The deck utilizes cards like Guide of Souls, Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides support for the creatures, while cards like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment offer additional reach to finish off the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Thraben Charm also disrupt the opponent's strategy, making it difficult for them to mount a defense.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing fast, aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage and control the board. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while also having some control elements like Static Prison and Elegant Parlor to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With powerful cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, this deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively.

The focus of this deck is to utilize combo pieces and powerful spells to control the board and deal damage without relying on traditional lands. By utilizing cards like Goblin Charbelcher, Lotus Bloom, and Whir of Invention, the deck can quickly assemble a winning combination while using disruptive spells like Disrupting Shoal and Force of Negation to control the opponent's plays. The inclusion of cards like Thundertrap Trainer and Waterlogged Teachings further enhance the deck's ability to stall and disrupt the opponent, making it a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.
